title: fragaria vesca subsp. viridis
intro: Fragaria vesca subsp. viridis, also known as the green wood strawberry or wild strawberry, is a subspecies of strawberry native to Europe and Asia. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Fragaria vesca subsp. viridis include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues or as a preventive measure to maintain overall well-being.
